title: Action Request — Contract 3c
description: Emitted by the rule engine (source=engine) or by a researcher manually triggering a rule (source=manual). Sent to Unity over /ws/runtime to invoke a parameterless abstract action. Omit target for a scene-level action; include a tag/id target for an object-level one.

intent_id.description: UUID for deduplication and event logging.

source_rule.description: ID of the rule that generated this request. Omitted for manual triggers with no associated rule.

source.description: engine = fired by the rule evaluator; manual = fired by the researcher via the dashboard trigger button.
